name: CppUnit
description: Unit testing framework for C++ that enables systematic testing of research software components, improving code reliability and maintainability through automated test execution and comprehensive testing capabilities.

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by encouraging modular code design and facilitating easier debugging through structured unit tests.
indicators.Reliability: measures Reliability by enabling systematic testing of software components, detecting defects early, and ensuring consistent behavior through automated test execution and coverage tracking.

useCases: Develop and run unit tests for C++ research software components
Ensure correctness and stability of code through automated testing
Improve code reliability by detecting bugs early in development
Integrate testing into CI/CD pipelines to maintain software quality over time
